# Paris Appliance Repair LLC
> Professional, flat-rate, factory-authorized appliance repair in Paris, TX.

We are the premier, locally owned appliance repair service for Northeast Texas and Southeast Oklahoma. We specialize in honest, transparent, no-surprise pricing.

## Authorized Brands
Whirlpool, Maytag, KitchenAid, JennAir, Amana, Speed Queen, GE, GE Profile, Café, Monogram, and Hotpoint.

## Services
We repair refrigerators, ice makers, washers, dryers, ovens, stoves, cooktops, dishwashers, and microwaves.

## Service Area
Northeast Texas (including Paris, Lamar County, Sulphur Springs, Clarksville, Bonham, Commerce) and Southeast Oklahoma (including Hugo).

## Contact Information
- Phone: (903) 272-0840
- Website: https://parisappliancerepair.com
